title: north annex envelope coordination — scaffold demo
description: Track north annex envelope and MEP rough-in scope. Includes RFI alignment, long-lead glazing updates, and field coordination notes for superintendent review.
internal_notes: Use this as demo seed data for richer overview/edit parity with source simulator examples.

title: Level 3 framing closeout
description: Close outstanding framing punch items and verify window opening tolerances before inspection.
internal_notes: Dependency on glazing submittal revision B.

title: Roof curb install verification
description: Confirm curb elevations against latest mechanical layout and close out QA checklist.
internal_notes: Completed and signed off by field engineer.

title: Lobby slab pour prep
description: Coordinate embeds, rebar congestion checks, and pour sequence with trade foremen.

title: South stair steel punch
description: Address weld touch-ups and missing fireproofing around stair stringers.

title: MEP corridor conflict review
description: Resolve duct and tray routing conflicts in Level 2 corridor and publish coordinated model.
internal_notes: Clash report archived in project docs.

title: North terrace waterproofing
description: Validate membrane sequencing and edge termination details before decking install.

title: East wing drywall readiness
description: Confirm in-wall inspections are complete and close framing corrections before board hang.

title: Loading dock bollard layout
description: Finalize dock protection layout and verify setback clearances with operations.

title: Commissioning pre-checklist
description: Assemble commissioning pre-checklist and assign owners for startup dependencies.
